title: nepeta distans
intro: Nepeta distans, also known as mountain mint or white mint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nepeta distans include relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations, as well as its ability to reduce stress and promote relaxation. Nepeta distans can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to reap its benefits.
